title: Bagel's Palette Blocks
description: Filling in some of the gaps left by Vanilla.
body: # Bagel's Palette Blocks This small mod aims to add more blocks to some of the stones that don't have them. These new building blocks includes a set for: - Dripstone, Calcite and Tuff - Netherrack and Basalt As well as bricks made from Cobblestone Currently developed for 1.20.1 by cassiancc. Original mod by MythrilBagels.
